steps.action: Create profile with name 'HomeTestUser', navigate home
steps.observed: Home page shows 'Welcome, HomeTestUser' and 'Welcome to OpenMarcus' with description

assertions.title: Begin meditation button navigates to session

steps.observed: URL changed to http://localhost:3101/session, session page shows with End meditation session button
Session page shows 'End meditation session' button, voice input/output controls, and message textarea - indicating active session

steps.action: Type message in textarea and click Send
steps.observed: Send button became enabled after typing, click triggered message send (Ollama not running so no response but send flow works)

assertions.title: End session button ends and shows summary

steps.observed: After ending session, page shows 'Begin a new meditation session' button, confirming session ended
History page shows 'Begin Meditation' link - empty state (no sessions yet)

assertions.title: Clicking session navigates to detail

steps.observed: Cannot test - no sessions exist in history yet (requires completed meditation session)

assertions.issues: No sessions in history to test clicking - requires a completed meditation session with Ollama running first

blockers.reason: No sessions in history to test clicking - requires a completed meditation session

summary: Home and session assertions pass. History list shows empty state. VAL-HISTORY-002 blocked - needs completed session first.
